allow: Bash(php -r 'require '\\''vendor/autoload.php'\\''; $app = require '\\''bootstrap/app.php'\\''; $kernel = $app->make\(Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel::class\); $kernel->bootstrap\(\); $bot = $app->make\(App\\Services\\Telegram\\TelegramBot::class\); echo $bot->unauthorizedReply\(\).PHP_EOL.'\\''---'\\''.PHP_EOL.$bot->linkedReply\(\).PHP_EOL.'\\''---'\\''.PHP_EOL; $parser = new App\\Services\\Telegram\\MessageParser\(\); print_r\($parser->parse\('\\''keluar 20.000 makan siang via Bank BCA'\\''\)\); print_r\($parser->parse\('\\''masuk 50rb gaji freelance via DANA'\\''\)\); print_r\($parser->parse\('\\''saldo'\\''\)\); print_r\($parser->parse\('\\''/bantuan'\\''\)\); print_r\($parser->parse\('\\''keluar abc via cash'\\''\)\); print_r\($parser->parse\('\\''keluar 25000 kopi'\\''\)\);')

Bash(php -r 'require '\\''vendor/autoload.php'\\''; $p = new App\\Services\\Telegram\\MessageParser\(\); foreach \(['\\''masuk Rp 25.000 kopi via Cash'\\'', '\\''keluar rp20000 jajan via gopay'\\'', '\\''keluar 20.000 makan siang via Bank BCA'\\''] as $m\) { print_r\($p->parse\($m\)\); }')
